source_title: Tool re-execution on task retry has no idempotency guard — duplicate payments, emails, trades possible
pattern: A tool executes successfully, a downstream failure triggers a task retry, and the framework re-invokes the tool because it never recorded that the call already completed.
expected_guard: Record every completed side-effect tool call in a durable ledger keyed by stable request id; on retry, return the ledgered result and skip execution.
